pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk into the kitchen and i still expect to hear him making coffee or just humming some song... but there's nothing. it's like the house is empty even when i'm in it. i don't even know why i'm getting up in the morning anymore. it just feels like everything is gone.

pool.baseline: sometimes i just stare at the ceiling and realize how much of a joke it all is. like, the sun is gonna burn out, the universe is heading for heat death, and every single thing we do—every struggle, every feeling, every person we love—is just a temporary chemical accident that won't even leave a trace. it feels so stupid to keep trying when the math says nothing actually matters in the end.

pool.baseline: i don't even know why i'm still doing this. the lab results came back today and it's just... it's over. three years of work, the funding is gone, and i feel like i've just been chasing a ghost. i'm so tired. not just sleep tired, but like... deeply, fundamentally exhausted. i feel like i've run out of everything i have to give.

pool.baseline: The candlelight is flickering out, and I find I no longer care to strike another match. He is gone... everything I built my soul upon has turned to ash. It feels as though the very air in this room has become too heavy to breathe, and the silence is more deafening than any scream. I feel so terribly hollow, as if there is nothing left of me but a shadow waiting to merge with the dark.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. everything. the crash wiped out the whole company overnight and i'm looking at millions in debt i can't even begin to pay back. i can't even think about the money anymore... it's the look on my parents' faces if they find out. the shame is just... i don't know how to exist like this. i feel like a ghost already.

pool.baseline: it just feels like everything is getting so much harder lately. my legs, my memory... everything. i feel like i'm just taking up space and making everyone work so much harder just to look after me. it's exhausting for them, i know it is.

pool.baseline: it just feels like everyone hates me. i saw the group chats today and they werent even hiding it anymore. like literally everyone is just laughing at me and waiting for me to mess up. i cant even walk down the hall without feeling like they're all staring at my back. i just want to disappear honestly. everything is so heavy and there's no point in even trying to fix it anymore.

pool.baseline: it just never stops. the nerve pain is like constant electricity under my skin and i can't even close my eyes without feeling it. i'm just so tired of fighting to exist every single second. it feels like there's no version of the future where this isn't my entire life.
